text:
On Sat, Feb 03, 2001 at 09:18:54PM -0500, petef@databits.net wrote:
> 
> >Number:         24840

> Databits Network Services, Inc.
> >Environment:
> 
> latest ports tree
> 
> >Description:
> 
> There is a newer version of nslint.
> 
> Also updated MAINTAINER (old MAINTAINER unresponsive), pkg-descr to include
> WWW: line, and made the port PREFIX friendly.

Just a question - is there a need for files/patch-aa?  Can this not be
accomplished by setting ALL_TARGET=nslint in the port Makefile?

Apart from that, I'll commit your changes; just waiting for your opinion
on this one :)

G'luck,
Peter

I am not the subject of this sentence.
